title: rubus keniensis
intro: Rubus keniensis, also known as the Kenyan raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of bramble native to the high-altitude regions of East Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to help alleviate pain and reduce oxidative stress. The health benefits of Rubus keniensis are attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and support digestive health. Rubus keniensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from arthritis to gastrointestinal issues.
